summary: Iteration 42: Review Dashboard API and UI testing complete. All 40 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. The Review Dashboard is fully functional with stats, products list, detail modal, families view, filters, approve/reject/edit-approve/bulk-approve actions.

code_quality.issue: React key warning - duplicate keys for products with same slug (e.g., 'maira-surgical-mask', 'maira-bouffant-cap'). Some products appear to have duplicate slugs in the database.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React console warnings about duplicate keys in product list - some products have duplicate slugs in database. Consider using a unique identifier like _id or index fallback for keys.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Review Dashboard fully working. Stats show: Total Products=1206, Canonical=565, Staged=908, Pending Review=640, Promoted=268. All review endpoints tested: /api/admin/review/stats, /api/admin/review/products, /api/admin/review/products/{slug}, /api/admin/review/products/{slug}/approve, /api/admin/review/products/{slug}/reject, /api/admin/review/products/{slug}/edit-approve, /api/admin/review/bulk-approve, /api/admin/review/families. UI components verified: stats bar, filter bar, products table, detail modal with comparison table, families view with bulk approve.

backend_api.GET /api/admin/review/stats: PASS - Returns total_products, total_canonical, total_staged, pending_review, total_promoted, by_status, by_action, by_division, coverage_pct
backend_api.GET /api/admin/review/products: PASS - Paginated list with filters (division, brand, status, action, confidence_min/max, family, pending_only)
backend_api.GET /api/admin/review/products/{slug}: PASS - Detail view with product, current, proposed, verification_log, promotion_log
backend_api.POST /api/admin/review/products/{slug}/a: PASS - Promotes product to canonical fields
backend_api.POST /api/admin/review/bulk-approve: PASS - Bulk approve by slugs, family, or brand
backend_api.GET /api/admin/review/families: PASS - Groups products by family with counts and avg confidence
backend_api.Auth required on all endpoints: PASS - All endpoints return 401/403 without token

frontend_ui.Stats bar: PASS - Shows Total Products, Canonical, Staged, Pending Review, Promoted
frontend_ui.Filter bar: PASS - Division, Status, Action dropdowns, Confidence min/max, Brand/Family search, Clear filters
frontend_ui.Products table: PASS - Shows Product, Division, Brand, Class, Conf, Status, Action columns with view/approve/reject buttons
frontend_ui.Detail modal: PASS - Opens with reasoning, current vs proposed comparison table, verification log, action buttons
frontend_ui.Families view: PASS - Shows family-level review with Approve All buttons
frontend_ui.Bulk selection: PASS - Checkbox selection shows bulk action bar with Approve Selected button
